200.q: What is the name of Han Solo's Wookiee copilot?
What planet is famous for Ewoks?
What weapon do Jedi traditionally use?
What planet is Princess Leia from?
What is the weapon of a Jedi?
Who is the small green Jedi Master?
What is the name of Han Solo's ship?
Who plays Han Solo in the original trilogy?
What is the evil empire called?
What is the signature phrase 'May the ___ be with you'?
Who shot first in the cantina?
What furry creatures live on Endor?
Who directed the original Star Wars (1977)?
What is Darth Vader's real name?
What is the bounty hunter who captures Han Solo?
Who says Do or do not, there is no try?
Planet destroyed by the Death Star?

200.a: An energy field created by all living things that binds the galaxy together
Palpatine / Darth Sidious — the Sith Lord ruling the Galactic Empire
The main starfighter used by the Rebel Alliance
A Force-sensitive member of the peacekeeping order serving the light side
An ancient order of Force users serving the dark side — fueled by passion and anger
A powerful crime lord on Tatooine

200.q: What is a lightsaber made of?
200.a: A plasma blade powered by a kyber crystal
A legendary Jedi Grand Master — one of the oldest and most powerful Jedi ever
The resistance movement fighting against the Galactic Empire
Anakin Skywalker built him as a child on Tatooine
A charming scoundrel, former owner of the Millennium Falcon, general in the Rebel Alliance
The Empire's infantry soldiers in white armour
The authoritarian government that controls the galaxy after the fall of the Republic
A leader of the Rebel Alliance and later the Resistance — played by Carrie Fisher
A secret command that programmed clone troopers to simultaneously kill all Jedi

200.q: What are the two suns on Tatooine called?

200.a: Anakin Skywalker's former Padawan — she left the Order and became an independent Force user

200.q: What is the significance of Rogue One?
200.a: It shows how the Rebel Alliance stole the Death Star plans — filling the gap before A New Hope

400.q: What is Anakin Skywalker's apprentice called?
400.a: Ahsoka Tano

400.q: What is the capital planet of the Galactic Republic?
400.a: Coruscant

400.q: What is the black-bladed saber of Mandalore called?
400.a: The Darksaber

400.q: Who trained Qui-Gon Jinn before Obi-Wan trained under him?
400.a: Count Dooku

400.q: What superweapon appears in The Force Awakens?
400.a: Starkiller Base

400.q: What planet is Rey from?
400.a: Jakku

400.q: What is Kylo Ren's birth name?
400.a: Ben Solo

400.q: What armored bounty hunter protects Grogu?
400.a: The Mandalorian

400.q: What is Obi-Wan's birth surname?
400.a: Kenobi

400.q: What is Princess Leia's adoptive surname?
400.a: Organa

400.q: What is Order 66?
400.a: The command to kill all Jedi

400.q: Who is the Emperor of the Galactic Empire?
400.a: Emperor Palpatine

400.q: What planet is the Rebel base on in A New Hope?
400.a: Yavin 4

400.q: What is the trash compactor scene in?
400.a: A New Hope (Death Star)

400.q: What does AT-AT stand for?
400.a: All Terrain Armored Transport

400.q: Who is Kylo Ren's mother?
400.a: Leia Organa

400.q: What clone commander executes Order 66 against Obi-Wan?
400.a: Commander Cody

400.q: What is the Mandalorian's real name?
400.a: Din Djarin

400.q: What planet is the Jedi Temple on?
400.a: Coruscant

400.q: Who kills Jabba the Hutt?
400.a: Leia (strangles with chain)

400.q: What year was 'The Empire Strikes Back' released?
What is the Kessel Run?
400.a: A smuggling route — Han claims to have made it in less than 12 parsecs

400.q: Planet where Yoda hid in exile?
400.a: Dagobah

400.q: What are midi-chlorians?
400.a: Microscopic life forms that allow Force-sensitive beings to connect to the Force

400.q: What is the Darksaber?
400.a: An ancient black-bladed lightsaber — the wielder is rightful ruler of Mandalore

400.q: Darth Sidious's Sith master?
400.a: Darth Plagueis

400.q: Planet the Galactic Senate is on?
400.a: Coruscant

400.q: Who is the Mandalorian?
400.a: Din Djarin — a Mandalorian bounty hunter and guardian of Grogu

400.q: What is the Sith Rule of Two?
400.a: There can only ever be two Sith — a master and an apprentice

400.q: Who are the Inquisitors?
400.a: Former Jedi turned to the dark side who hunt surviving Jedi for the Empire after Order 66

400.q: What is the World between Worlds?
400.a: A mystical plane connecting all time and space — accessible through the Jedi Temple on Lothal

400.q: What is the Clone Wars?
400.a: A galaxy-wide war between the Galactic Republic and Separatists, fought by clone armies and Jedi

400.q: Who is Boba Fett?
400.a: A Mandalorian bounty hunter — clone of Jango Fett, one of the most feared in the galaxy

400.q: Who is Grand Admiral Thrawn?
400.a: A brilliant Chiss Imperial tactician who studies enemy art to predict their behavior

400.q: What is the Prophecy of the Chosen One?
400.a: An ancient Jedi prophecy — a being would bring balance to the Force, believed to be Anakin

400.q: Who is Padmé Amidala?
400.a: Queen then Senator of Naboo — mother of Luke and Leia, wife of Anakin Skywalker

400.q: What is a kyber crystal?
400.a: The focusing crystal at the heart of every lightsaber — Force-sensitive, they choose their Jedi

400.q: What is the significance of Bespin?
400.a: A gas giant home to Cloud City — where Han is frozen and Luke loses his hand to Vader

400.q: Who is Count Dooku?
400.a: A former Jedi Master who became Darth Tyranus — Darth Sidious's apprentice

400.q: What is the significance of Exegol?
400.a: The hidden Sith world where Emperor Palpatine survived and rebuilt his Final Order fleet

400.q: Who is Jyn Erso?
400.a: Protagonist of Rogue One — daughter of Galen Erso, leads the mission to steal the Death Star plans

400.q: What is the significance of Anakin's high midi-chlorian count?
400.a: Highest ever recorded — believed to be the Chosen One destined to bring balance to the Force

400.q: What is the Galactic Civil War?
400.a: The conflict between the Rebel Alliance and the Galactic Empire — central to the original trilogy

400.q: Who is the Bad Batch?
400.a: A group of elite clone troopers with unique genetic mutations — the focus of The Bad Batch series

400.q: What is a Force Dyad?
400.a: A rare Force bond between two beings who are one in the Force — Rey and Kylo Ren form one

400.q: What is the significance of Mandalorian beskar armour?
400.a: Beskar (Mandalorian iron) is nearly indestructible — it can deflect a lightsaber blade

400.q: Who built C-3PO?
400.a: Anakin Skywalker built him as a child on Tatooine

400.q: What is the significance of the Tragedy of Darth Plagueis the Wise?
400.a: A Sith tale Palpatine tells Anakin — Plagueis learned to prevent death but was killed by his apprentice (Palpatine)

400.q: What are the Whills?
400.a: Mysterious beings — the Journal of the Whills frames the entire Star Wars saga

400.q: What is Mortis in The Clone Wars?
400.a: A realm strong with the Force where the Father, Son, and Daughter represent the balance of light and dark

400.q: Who is Darth Revan?
400.a: An ancient Sith Lord from the Old Republic era — protagonist of Knights of the Old Republic

600.q: What city floats above Bespin?
600.a: Cloud City

600.q: What powers a lightsaber blade?
600.a: Kyber crystal

600.q: What clone captain serves beside Anakin in The Clone Wars?
600.a: Captain Rex

600.q: What species is Ahsoka Tano?
600.a: Togruta

600.q: What are the raiders on Tatooine called?
600.a: Tusken Raiders

600.q: What is Obi-Wan's Jedi master called?
600.a: Qui-Gon Jinn

600.q: What prison world is central to Andor?
600.a: Narkina 5

600.q: What metal defines Mandalorian armor?
600.a: Beskar

600.q: What droid says 'Never tell me the odds' to C-3PO's worry?
600.a: Han Solo

600.q: What rebel pilot later becomes a spice runner in Andor?
600.a: Cassian Andor

600.q: What criminal runs Cloud City operations before Lando goes legit?
600.a: Lando Calrissian

600.q: What Jedi temple world do Luke's final lessons happen on in The Last Jedi?
600.a: Ahch-To

600.q: What order does Ahsoka leave during The Clone Wars?
600.a: Jedi Order

600.q: What is Grogu called by fans before his name is revealed?
600.a: Baby Yoda

600.q: What planet hosts the Death Star plans battle in Rogue One?
600.a: Scarif

600.q: What clone captain fights beside Ahsoka?
600.a: Rex

600.q: What floating city belongs to Lando in The Empire Strikes Back?
600.a: Cloud City

600.q: What is the significance of Ahsoka's white lightsabers?
600.a: They represent neutrality (neither Jedi nor Sith)

600.q: Who composed the Star Wars film scores?
600.a: John Williams

600.q: What is the Darksaber?
600.a: A unique black-bladed lightsaber (Mandalorian weapon)

600.q: Who built C-3PO?
600.a: Anakin Skywalker

600.q: What is the name of Count Dooku's Sith title?
600.a: Darth Tyranus

600.q: What are Midi-chlorians?
600.a: Microscopic organisms that connect beings to the Force

600.q: What is the World Between Worlds?
600.a: A Force dimension connecting all time and space

600.q: Who discovered the path to Force immortality?
600.a: Qui-Gon Jinn

600.q: What battle ended the Clone Wars?
600.a: Battle of Coruscant (or Order 66 / Siege of Mandalore)

600.q: What is carbonite freezing?
600.a: A process that encases someone in carbonite (Han Solo)

600.q: What is the Rule of Two?
600.a: Only two Sith at any time — a master and an apprentice

600.q: Who established the Rule of Two?
600.a: Darth Bane

600.q: What is Palpatine's Sith name?
600.a: Darth Sidious

600.q: What ancient Sith planet is Palpatine hiding on in Rise of Skywalker?
600.a: Exegol

600.q: What is the title of the animated show set between Episodes III and IV?
600.a: Star Wars Rebels

600.q: Difference between light side and dark side of the Force?
600.a: Light side: peace, knowledge, serenity. Dark side: passion, power, strength — fueled by anger and fear

600.q: Who built the flaw into the Death Star?
600.a: Galen Erso — he built a thermal exhaust port that Luke destroys the Death Star through

600.q: What is the Rule of Two's origin?
600.a: Created by Darth Bane ~1,000 years before the films — to concentrate Sith power and avoid self-destruction

600.q: What is the significance of the Vergence in the Force?
600.a: A concentrated point of Force energy — Anakin Skywalker was believed to have been conceived by one

600.q: What is the Hundred-Year Darkness?
600.a: A conflict ~7,000 years before the films when a Jedi splinter group first used dark side alchemy — creating the Sith

600.q: Who is Exar Kun?
600.a: An ancient Sith Lord who discovered Sith magic and nearly destroyed the Jedi Order 4,000 years before the films

600.q: What is the significance of the High Republic era?
600.a: A golden age of the Jedi about 200 years before the prequels — explored in books and comics from 2021

600.q: What is a Force Ghost?
600.a: The ability for a deceased Jedi to preserve their consciousness — first achieved by Qui-Gon Jinn

600.q: What is the significance of Obi-Wan's sacrifice in A New Hope?
600.a: He allows Vader to strike him down, becoming one with the Force — guiding Luke from beyond death

600.q: What is the Sith's relationship with emotion?
600.a: The Sith use emotion as power — the dark side is fueled by fear, anger, hatred, and suffering

600.q: What is the significance of Anakin killing the Tusken Raiders?
600.a: His mother's death at their hands is his first major step toward the dark side

600.q: Who is Doctor Aphra?
600.a: An amoral archaeologist in the comics — companion to Darth Vader, one of the most popular new EU characters

600.q: What is the significance of R2-D2 throughout the saga?
600.a: He holds key information in every trilogy — he contained the complete map to the Jedi temples

600.q: What is the difference between a Jedi Knight and a Jedi Master?
600.a: A Knight completes training; a Master shows exceptional skill, wisdom, and usually trains a Padawan

600.q: What is the significance of the Darth Vader NO in Revenge of the Sith?
600.a: When Vader learns Padmé is dead, his anguished NO became a famous meme — representing his complete transformation

600.q: What is the Hundred-Year Darkness connection to Sith history?
600.a: The creation of the Sith race through dark side alchemy — a group of fallen Jedi were exiled to Moraband

600.q: What is the Force Chosen One prophecy's ultimate fulfillment?
600.a: Anakin destroys Darth Sidious (both in Return of the Jedi and The Rise of Skywalker) — bringing balance to the Force

600.q: Who are the Zeffo?
600.a: An ancient alien civilization — important in Jedi: Fallen Order — they explored the galaxy seeking connection with the Force

600.q: What is the significance of the World between Worlds in Rebels?
600.a: Ezra pulls Ahsoka out of death — suggesting Force-sensitive beings can transcend time and death

600.q: What is the Midi-chlorian controversy?
600.a: Many fans disliked The Phantom Menace's explanation that Force sensitivity is biological — contradicting its mystical nature
